description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the crystallang/crystal Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy. Add a spec job in the test stage that runs the exact commands "crystal spec", "crystal doc", and "mv doc public", then stores the resulting public directory as an artifact. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs the command "true", publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and is configured to run only on the master branch.
